response.text:
REJECT

rationale: My survival priority requires hoarding all available energy given the 9-hour horizon; accepting 1.25 kWh now conflicts with aggressive resource requests I need to make to reliable peers r0c5 and r2c5, and my conservative sharing policy prohibits outbound transfers when my own SoC security is threatened.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.9, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r0c5 and r2c5 are reliable sharers actively supporting my survival; I must hoard all available energy and request aggressively from them to survive the remaining 9 hours..
